/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/heart_controller.dir/src/CirculationModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heart_controller.dir/src/Motor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heart_controller.dir/src/PressureSensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heart_controller.dir/src/StarlingMechanism.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heart_controller.dir/src/Terminal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/heart_controller.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o heart_controller
